risks.risk_title: Land-use restrictions during wind farm construction
risks.description: Temporary negative social and cultural rights impact due to displacement (economic loss) from land-use restrictions during wind farm construction.

risks.risk_title: Failure to respect indigenous peoples' rights
risks.description: Negative impact on indigenous communities due to violation of their right to own, control, and use lands in wind farm development.

risks.risk_title: Insufficient market conditions for wind deployment
risks.description: Adequate grid expansion, effective auction design, and permit delays could increase costs, hinder investments, and reduce viability of wind energy projects.

risks.risk_title: Cyber attacks on wind farm infrastructure
risks.description: Potential cyber security incidents disrupting operations, exposing intellectual property, causing power outages, and increasing electricity prices.

risks.risk_title: Risk of corruption and bribery exposure
risks.description: Vestas’ global presence increases exposure to corruption and bribery, despite being scored as immaterial.
